ecec_notes: BLS ECEC Q4 2024 (https://www.bls.gov/ect/): Government worker wages are approximately 72.2% of total compensation (implies benefit multiplier = 1/0.722 = 1.385). Additional overhead factor 1.05× applied for training, equipment, and facilities. Combined fully loaded factor = 1.385 × 1.05 = 1.4543. Note: ECEC parameters are static constants derived from published ECEC tables, not fetched via API. ECEC API does not provide a machine-readable series for the government benefit cost share.
